name: google-analytics
description: Access Google Analytics 4 data through MCP

tools.name: getUrlPageViews
tools.description: Get page views for a specific URL path

parameters.name: url
parameters.description: The URL path to get page views for (e.g. /about)

parameters.name: startDate
parameters.description: Start date in YYYY-MM-DD format (defaults to 30 days ago)

parameters.name: endDate
parameters.description: End date in YYYY-MM-DD format (defaults to today)
